articles.title: 2026 NFL combine stock up/stock down, Day 3: Taylen Green among 10 players on the move - NFL.com
articles.description: Who boosted their draft stock and who took a step in the wrong direction on the third day of workouts at the 2026 NFL Scouting Combine? Chad Reuter provides a stock report from Indianapolis.

articles.author: Josh Edwards
articles.title: NFL combine 2026: Biggest moments, fastest 40s and standout performances from QB, WR, RB workouts - CBS Sports
articles.description: Relive everything that happened during on-field workouts in Indianapolis on Saturday afternoon
articles.content:
Running backs started the action Saturday before giving way to the quarterback and wide receivers. Notre Dame RB Jeremiyah Love was a top performer once the action moved over to the field.
